assertions.title: No PII or secrets in remote history

steps.action: Clone remote repository to /tmp for isolated verification
steps.expected: Clean clone of remote main branch

steps.action: Run npm run secret-scan against cloned repository
steps.expected: Secret scan passes with exit code 0

steps.action: Check git log for credential patterns in commit messages
steps.expected: No hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, or passwords
steps.observed: Only 1 match: 'chore(release): add secret scanning and github release readiness flow' (expected)

steps.action: Check git log for personal paths and PII in commit messages
steps.expected: No personal paths, IP addresses, emails, or phone numbers

steps.action: Search current tree for ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN references
steps.expected: No references to actual credentials in current tree
steps.observed: No matches found (only in deleted history, not current tree)

steps.action: Search current tree for general credential patterns
steps.expected: Only documentation references to environment variables
steps.observed: Only documentation references found (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, etc.)

steps.action: Verify commit history shows only clean limited commits
steps.expected: Limited number of commits starting from clean rebase
steps.observed: 57 commits total, from 'Remove NanoClaw assets' to 'chore: add mission infrastructure files'

evidence.summary: Secret scan: PASSED | Commit messages: CLEAN | Current tree: CLEAN | History: 57 commits from clean rebase

summary: Tested VAL-REPO-003: PASSED. Remote repository contains no PII or secrets. Secret scan passed, git history shows 57 clean commits from rebase, no credential patterns in commit messages or current tree. All verification completed successfully in read-only isolated environment.
